expectations.evidence: Files are split by clear logical concerns: 01 covers backend profile read/nickname API, 02 covers backend avatar upload, 03 covers backend password change, and 04 covers the entire frontend. Each file maps to a cohesive domain, not an arbitrary split. File 04 explicitly states '01~03 번 todo의 API가 완성된 후 진행하세요' showing intentional concern boundaries.

Files use numbered prefixes 01–04 that reflect execution order. File 01 establishes schema and auth middleware that 02 and 03 depend on. File 04 explicitly states it depends on 01–03: '01~03 번 todo의 API가 완성된 후 진행하세요'. The ordering correctly encodes the dependency chain.

Every file has a context paragraph and an Assumption block. E.g., file 01: '이 엔드포인트들은 프론트엔드 프로필 페이지의 기반이 되며, 이후 아바타 업로드·비밀번호 변경 API가 동일한 auth 미들웨어와 사용자 타입을 공유합니다.' File 02: '이미지 검증·리사이징 후 저장하고, 저장된 URL을 사용자 레코드에 반영합니다.' Each explains WHY and HOW the work fits.

Items are specific and actionable with file paths, commands, and implementation details. E.g., 'prisma/schema.prisma의 User 모델에 nickname String?과 avatarUrl String? 필드 추가 후 npx prisma migrate dev --name add-user-profile-fields 실행', 'src/lib/upload.ts에 multer 설정 구현: 허용 MIME 타입(image/jpeg, image/png, image/webp), 최대 파일 크기 5MB, 메모리 스토리지(memoryStorage) 사용'. Sufficient detail for a worker agent.

Schema/model changes are included in file 01 alongside API route implementation. The item 'prisma/schema.prisma의 User 모델에 nickname String?과 avatarUrl String? 필드 추가 후 npx prisma migrate dev' is the first checklist item in 01-backend-profile-api.md, which also contains GET/PATCH route implementations. There is no dedicated todo file for DB schema changes.

Multiple files include full test file paths and named scenarios. File 01: 'src/routes/__tests__/users.test.ts 작성: (a) 인증된 사용자가 프로필 조회 성공, (b) 인증 토큰 없을 때 401 반환, (c) 닉네임 변경 성공, (d) 중복 닉네임으로 409 반환, (e) 20자 초과 닉네임으로 400 반환'. File 02: 'src/routes/__tests__/avatar.test.ts 작성: (a)~(d)'. File 04: 'src/components/profile/__tests__/NicknameForm.test.tsx' and 'src/components/profile/__tests__/PasswordChangeForm.test.tsx' with named scenarios. Full paths and 2+ specific scenarios are present throughout.

Every file has an explicit Assumption block. File 01: 'JWT 기반 인증, Express + TypeScript 백엔드, ORM은 Prisma 사용 가정. DB 스키마에 users 테이블이 이미 존재하나 nickname, avatarUrl 컬럼은 이번 작업에서 추가.' File 02: '파일 저장은 로컬 public/uploads/avatars/에 저장 (외부 스토리지 서비스 미사용). 이미지 처리는 sharp 라이브러리 사용.' File 04: 'React + TypeScript, React Query(TanStack Query)로 서버 상태 관리'. Architectural assumptions are stated explicitly.

File 04 specifies prop interfaces for AvatarUpload: 'props { currentAvatarUrl: string | null, onSuccess: (newUrl: string) => void }'. NicknameForm and PasswordChangeForm checklist items describe their behavior but do not explicitly declare prop interfaces. At least one component has a clearly specified TypeScript prop interface with types.
